title: Modifier Phrase Domain Schema
description: Validates adjectival and adverbial expressions (ADJ, ADV) serving as structural modifiers within nominal, verbal, or clausal projections.

pos_payload.description: Behavioral payload for tokens modifying phrasal properties or event characteristics.

modification_scope.description: The abstract phrasal or clausal projection target of this modifier.

functional_scope.description: Specifies secondary grammatical, temporal, or logical domains targeted by the modifier beyond basic phrasal description.

token_class.description: The lexical category corresponding directly to the modifier UPOS.

attachment_target.description: Linear placement constraint of the modifier relative to its structural host.

ud_deprel_default.description: Default Universal Dependencies syntactic relation for modifiers.

surface_forms.description: Standard orthographic realizations of this modifier entry.

structural_constraints.description: Explicit instructions regarding allomorphy, stem constraints, or word order syntax rules.

internal_structure.description: Morphological decomposition of the modifier, tracking its base derivation or reduplication structure.

root_lemma.description: The base predicate or noun lemma from which this modifier is derived.

reduplication_type.description: Type of morphological reduplication applied to the root.

morphotactics.description: A structural formula describing the affixation pattern (e.g., 'ROOT + -takin').
